title: Haryana Judge Duped of ₹52 Lakh in Tinder Honey Trap; Probe Finds Gaps
description: According to officials, Vasisht convinced the judge to invest money with promises of high returns. Trusting him, she transferred large sums amounting to ₹52 lakh into his accounts over a period of time. The fraud came to light only after she failed to receive the promised returns.
